3. LogLik Traces Comparison (N_MONITORS=1, Time-Scaled)

This section shows the log-likelihood search traces for the \(N\_MONITORS=1\) models. The x-axis represents execution time in seconds, scaled by the execution runtimes of their corresponding \(N\_MONITORS=0\) runs. The mif (IF2) part and the train (DMOP/training) part of each model’s trace are scaled independently by their respective \(N\_MONITORS=0\) component runtimes.

5. Best Log-Likelihoods (N_MONITORS=0 & N_MONITORS=1)

This section displays the log-likelihood statistics obtained from the final pfilter evaluations across the replicates for both the \(N\_MONITORS=0\) and \(N\_MONITORS=1\) runs.

To ensure consistency and transparency, we report: 1. Best LogLik (Post-Pruned, index=-1): The fresh, unbiased evaluation of the single selected best replicate.

  1. Best LogLik (Pre-Pruned, index=-2): The maximum evaluation among all 100 replicates before pruning. (Note: Due to selection bias/the winner’s curse and particle filter stochasticity, the maximum value in index=-2 may appear slightly higher than the fresh evaluation in index=-1).

  2. Median LogLik (Pre-Pruned, index=-2): The median evaluation across all 100 replicates.

N_MONITORS = 0 Models

Model Best LogLik (Post-Pruned, index=-1) Best LogLik (Pre-Pruned, index=-2) Median LogLik (Pre-Pruned, index=-2)
IFAD-0 -3748.57 -3748.52 -3753.93
IFAD-0.97 -3744.17 -3743.95 -3745.37
IFAD-1 -3745.17 -3744.6 -3749.47
IF2 -3747.82 -3747.82 -3755.41

N_MONITORS = 1 Models

Model Best LogLik (Post-Pruned, index=-1) Best LogLik (Pre-Pruned, index=-2) Median LogLik (Pre-Pruned, index=-2)

IFAD-0.97 -3744.19 -3743.71 -3744.22
IFAD-1 -3744.19 -3744.1 -3745.46
IF2 -3747.02 -3747.33 -3752.41
